news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth co-promoters pledged 635,000 shares on Mar 4.
This raises concerns over governance and potential stock price impact.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth co-promoters pledged 635,000 shares on Mar 4.
This raises concerns over governance and potential stock price impact.

news.title:
SEBI launched Life Cycle Funds to replace Solution Oriented Funds, promoting disciplined, long-term investing with automatic asset allocation.
These funds reduce tax issues, emotional allocation errors, and behavior risks, offering open-ended flexibility with SEBI-regulated exit loads.
news.summary:
SEBI launched Life Cycle Funds to replace Solution Oriented Funds, promoting disciplined, long-term investing with automatic asset allocation.
These funds reduce tax issues, emotional allocation errors, and behavior risks, offering open-ended flexibility with SEBI-regulated exit loads.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd forms subsidiary Anand Rathi FME IFSC Pvt Ltd in GIFT City.
The subsidiary will manage funds under AIF regulations, with 100% equity subscribed in cash.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd forms subsidiary Anand Rathi FME IFSC Pvt Ltd in GIFT City.
The subsidiary will manage funds under AIF regulations, with 100% equity subscribed in cash.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.

news.title:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.
news.summary:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.

news.title:
SBI Cards' Q3 shows profitability growth supported by asset quality and spending trends.
However, cards in force (CIF) and receivables growth remain subdued, dividing analysts' opinions.
news.summary:
SBI Cards' Q3 shows profitability growth supported by asset quality and spending trends.
However, cards in force (CIF) and receivables growth remain subdued, dividing analysts' opinions.

news.summary: Anand Rathi experiences lag in broking revenue despite AUM growth.

news.title:
Anand Rathi forecasts 20-25% growth for next fiscal, maintaining guidance.
The company plans to reinvest gains to strengthen departments over operating leverage.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi forecasts 20-25% growth for next fiscal, maintaining guidance.
The company plans to reinvest gains to strengthen departments over operating leverage.

news.title:
Anand Rathi nears ₹1 lakh crore AUM, showcasing growth, margins, and ROE improvements.
The CEO elaborates on Q3 growth story and performance on ET Now.
news.summary:

Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd discussed Q3 FY26 earnings and performance.
The call included financial insights, management commentary, and outlook.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth reappoints Rakesh Rawal as Whole-Time Director and CEO.
This move underscores the firm's commitment to leadership continuity and strategic direction.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth reappoints Rakesh Rawal as Whole-Time Director and CEO.
This move underscores the firm's commitment to leadership continuity and strategic direction.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth's 9M FY26 PAT rose 29% YoY to ₹294 Cr; revenue up 21% to ₹897 Cr.
Q3 FY26 PAT at ₹100 Cr (+30% YoY); revenue ₹306 Cr (+25% YoY). AUM grew 30% to ₹99,008 Cr.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth's 9M FY26 PAT rose 29% YoY to ₹294 Cr; revenue up 21% to ₹897 Cr.
Q3 FY26 PAT at ₹100 Cr (+30% YoY); revenue ₹306 Cr (+25% YoY). AUM grew 30% to ₹99,008 Cr.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd announces Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 13, 2026.
Key executives to participate; pre-registration and dial-in details provided for investors.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd announces Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 13, 2026.
Key executives to participate; pre-registration and dial-in details provided for investors.

news.title:
Silver surged Rs 45,000/kg in 10 days, delivering 180% returns in 2025, driven by robust industrial demand and supply constraints.
Analysts advise caution, citing high volatility and unsustainable fundamentals for long-term investment in silver.
news.summary:
Silver surged Rs 45,000/kg in 10 days, delivering 180% returns in 2025, driven by robust industrial demand and supply constraints.
Analysts advise caution, citing high volatility and unsustainable fundamentals for long-term investment in silver.

news.title:
2025 saw equity market volatility, with mid and small-cap stocks falling 30-45%, while large-cap funds delivered 7.9% YTD and small-cap funds fell 6.4%.
Experts foresee 2026 with improved macros, Fed easing, and GDP growth above 7%, urging disciplined, diversified investment strategies.
news.summary:
2025 saw equity market volatility, with mid and small-cap stocks falling 30-45%, while large-cap funds delivered 7.9% YTD and small-cap funds fell 6.4%.
Experts foresee 2026 with improved macros, Fed easing, and GDP growth above 7%, urging disciplined, diversified investment strategies.

news.title:
SEBI reduces mutual fund expense ratios by 10-15 bps under new 2026 regulations.
Changes include a clearer Base Expense Ratio framework, benefiting long-term investors.
news.summary:
SEBI reduces mutual fund expense ratios by 10-15 bps under new 2026 regulations.
Changes include a clearer Base Expense Ratio framework, benefiting long-term investors.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth sold 23.7L subsidiary shares for Rs. 5.4Cr.
Subsidiary's income was Rs. 40.6L, 0.04% of parent's income; promoter group buyer.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth sold 23.7L subsidiary shares for Rs. 5.4Cr.
Subsidiary's income was Rs. 40.6L, 0.04% of parent's income; promoter group buyer.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd sold its entire stake in Freedom Wealth Solutions Pvt Ltd.
The 23.71L shares were sold for Rs. 5.37 cr to Aqua Proof Wall Plast Pvt Ltd.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd sold its entire stake in Freedom Wealth Solutions Pvt Ltd.
The 23.71L shares were sold for Rs. 5.37 cr to Aqua Proof Wall Plast Pvt Ltd.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd disclosed under SEBI SAST Regulation 29(1) about a 0.2529% acquisition of equity shares.
The acquisition was conducted via open market, involving 2,10,000 shares, keeping total voting capital unchanged.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd disclosed under SEBI SAST Regulation 29(1) about a 0.2529% acquisition of equity shares.
